alerts.title: CPU_THROTTLING
alerts.description: model-serving CPU throttled. Container exceeding quota limit of 2000m. Inference latency degraded.

alerts.title: TIMEOUT
alerts.description: fraud-detector failing to get scores from model-serving. 94% timeout rate over last 3 minutes.

alerts.title: FRAUD_MODE_ACTIVE
alerts.description: payment-service fallback to allow-all fraud mode. Fraud scoring unavailable.

alerts.title: ELEVATED_LATENCY
alerts.description: search-service p95 latency 1200ms. Unrelated to primary incident — index rotation in progress.

alerts.title: INDEX_ROTATION_RUNNING
alerts.description: Scheduled index rotation is consuming I/O. Expected to complete in 12 minutes. Not incident-related.
